description_long: This object is a modern, floor-mounted toilet with a rectangular cistern and a smooth, rounded bowl. The cistern is tall and boxy, with a flat top that may accommodate a flush button or lever, though no flush mechanism is clearly visible. The bowl has a gently curved front and a flat, closed lid, giving it a streamlined appearance. The base of the toilet is angular and geometric, tapering slightly toward the floor, which adds to its contemporary design. The entire surface is a uniform light gray or white color, suggesting a ceramic or porcelain material with a smooth, hard finish. There are no visible accessibility features or decorative elements, and the design is minimalistic and functional.
description: A modern, floor-mounted toilet with a rectangular cistern and a smooth, rounded bowl, finished in a uniform light color. The design is minimalistic, with a flat lid and no visible flush mechanism.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated bowl, tall rectangular cistern, and flat lid.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded bowl and the full width of the cistern.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the bowl's curve and cistern's height.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the cistern and the straight lines of the base.
